since_last: 47% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.41%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 47% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.16% · BTC -0.58% · Gold +0.76% · Nasdaq100 +0.54%. 47% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.41%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.41%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SNAP is the standout at -14.01%
cards.body: Leaders: MGNI +11.64%, AMAT +8.92%, TLN +7.17%, LRCX +6.45%, ASML +5.91%. Laggards: SNAP -14.01%, RXRX -6.23%, CRNC -4.92%, SOUN -4.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.05% at $196.45
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
